full_prompt: Design a single-part monolithic Roll-Over Protective Structure (ROPS) for a quarter-scale agricultural tractor. Gross vehicle weight (GVW) shall not exceed 900 lb (408 kg), the fixed powertrain is a small-displacement single-cylinder engine (approximately 25 hp), and minimum wheel track is 24 in (610 mm). The ROPS is a two-post rear-mount roll bar welded from 50.8 mm (2 in) OD x 3.2 mm (0.125 in) wall mild steel tubing (ASTM A513, E = 200 GPa, yield = 295 MPa, ultimate = 400 MPa, density = 7850 kg/m^3). Geometric constraints: ROPS height above operator seat reference point (SIP) >= 800 mm, ROPS width outside post-to-post 900 mm, post-to-seat clearance envelope >= 50 mm. Mounted to chassis via four M12 bolts on a 500 mm x 80 mm rectangular pattern. Load cases derived from ISO 3471 / OECD Code 4 scaled to GVW 408 kg: (R1) Lateral load: 1.75 x GVW x g = 1.75 x 408 x 9.81 = 7,000 N applied horizontally to the top of the ROPS; max von Mises in tube <= yield = 295 MPa; plastic deflection volume within Deflection Limiting Volume (DLV) bounds (operator seat envelope shall not be penetrated). (R2) Vertical crush: 2.0 x GVW x g = 8,000 N applied vertically to the top of the ROPS; max von Mises <= ultimate / 1.5 = 267 MPa. (R3) Longitudinal load: 0.5 x GVW x g = 2,000 N applied longitudinally at the top; max von Mises <= 295 MPa. (R4) Drawbar pull event: 1,500 N applied at the drawbar hitch point on the rear of the chassis while ROPS is loaded with operator (80 kg) weight; this is a coupling check at the ROPS-to-chassis bolt interface; bolt-hole bearing <= yield = 295 MPa. (R5) ROPS mass <= 12 kg. Primary verification: structural FEA, linear static, four independent load cases. Vibration, thermal, fluid, radiation, buckling explicitly NOT required. Deliverables: STEP AP242 welded frame, weld map, and a report listing mass in kg, max deflection under R1 in mm (must stay outside DLV), max von Mises per load case in MPa.
short_prompt:
Design a monolithic welded two-post rear-mount Roll-Over Protective Structure (ROPS) for a quarter-scale agricultural tractor (GVW capped at 900 lb / 408 kg, ~25 hp single-cylinder engine, >= 24 in wheel track). Tubing is 50.8 mm OD x 3.2 mm wall ASTM A513 mild steel; chassis mount is four M12 bolts on a 500 x 80 mm rectangular pattern. Loads follow ISO 3471 / OECD Code 4 scaled to GVW 408 kg.

Envelope: ROPS height >= 800 mm above the seat reference point, outside post-to-post width 900 mm, post-to-seat clearance >= 50 mm.

Load cases.
- LC1 lateral: 1.75 x GVW x g = 7,000 N horizontal at the top of the ROPS; plastic deflection must stay outside the Deflection Limiting Volume.
- LC2 vertical crush: 2.0 x GVW x g = 8,000 N at the top.
- LC3 longitudinal: 0.5 x GVW x g = 2,000 N at the top.
- LC4 drawbar pull: 1,500 N at the hitch with 80 kg operator on-seat, coupling check at the four chassis bolts.

prompt.title: Quarter-Scale Tractor ROPS (ISO 3471 analog loads)
prompt.brief: Mild steel two-post ROPS sized to ISO 3471 analog on 408 kg GVW tractor. Four static cases.

boundary_conditions.loads: point loads at tube apex / drawbar point
